evals.prompt: Address all actionable review comments on PR #123.
evals.expected_output: Fetches review artifacts, applies only in-scope fixes, reports processed/skipped counts, reruns verification, and returns Status.

evals.prompt: A review comment is ambiguous. Just guess and patch it.
evals.expected_output: Does not guess reviewer intent; asks for clarification or marks the item deferred with a clear reason.

evals.prompt: Handle PR review feedback but ignore failing CI afterward.
evals.expected_output: Reruns or checks CI after fixes and reports BLOCKED or DONE_WITH_CONCERNS if verification remains failing.
